a small website, for a very big feeling

To my Nono,
my Baby, my Haya

There is no version of my days that doesn't begin and end with you. I built this little corner of the internet because words said out loud disappear too fast — and what I feel for you deserves somewhere to stay.

chapter one

Every face you make, I've fallen for

Turn each one over. There's something I've never said out loud waiting behind it.

the elevator, mid-sentence

Even caught off guard, you're the most beautiful thing I've ever looked at.

that shy little smile

That smile has ruined every other smile for me. I don't want another one.

golden hour, on the balcony

You look at the camera like you already know you're loved. Good — you are.

quiet evening, soft light

My favorite version of you is the calm, unposed one. Just like this.

a moment only I got to see

You let me see the silly, unfiltered you. I keep every one of these safe.

old tape, timeless face

Any filter, any year, any lighting — it's always, always you that I want.

tap a photo
chapter two — turning 21

21 reasons I love you, Haya

One for every year that made you into the person I can't stop choosing. Tap a number.

chapter three

All of you, held in one shape

Happy almost-21st, ya nono. You didn't just grow up beautifully — you grew into someone I'm endlessly grateful to love. Thank you for choosing me back, every single day. This page ends, but this isn't close to over.

— yours, always

made with love, just for haya
Reason 1
